items.headline: Bailey seeks to classify any organization receiving $10K in Illinois state grants as a ‘public body’
items.summary: The move would subject those orgs to open meetings, FOIA laws; the Pritzker campaign calls it a stunt that would hurt small nonprofits.

items.headline: ‘Surreal’: Illinois’ only International Dark Sky Place attracts tourists worldwide
items.summary: The legislature in recent years has taken steps to limit light pollution.

items.headline: Jessica Dixon Heitman appointed to ex-IL Rep. Harry Benton’s seat
items.summary: The granddaughter of late U.S. Sen. Alan Dixon is the choice of local Democratic Party insiders.

items.headline: New Illinois laws taking effect July 1: What to know
items.summary: New Illinois laws taking effect July 1 affect driver's licenses, schools, foster care, liquor laws, e-bikes and more across the state.

items.headline: Bureau County motorcyclist killed in Illinois 29 crash identified
items.summary: The Bureau County Coroner has identified a 45-year-old Bureau County man who died in a motorcycle crash Sunday on Illinois 29 near Depue.

items.headline: No charges filed against Illinois State Police trooper in fatal January shooting
items.summary: Prosecutors have cleared an Illinois State Police trooper in the fatal shooting of a woman during a January traffic stop in East St. Louis.
